title: Post Second Impact Political Landscape
wikitext:
[]: Post-Second Impact Political Landscape             Quote Post by Sun Stealer » Fri Feb 12, 2010 5:42 pm What do we know of the political landscape post-second impact? Wknow there was a world war immediately following Second Impact. We know since then the UN has been transformed into a unified, militarized organization. The four great powers of Post-2I world seem to be Japan, America, Germany, and China. Is there is any other information out there?

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Fri Feb 12, 2010 6:50 pm I think that's it...Didnt most of the world get flooded when the ice melted of something around those lines?

[]:             Quote Post by planet news » Fri Feb 12, 2010 6:55 pm Everything is apparently ruled and orchestrated by Seele. Including the UN.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Feb 12, 2010 7:02 pm planet news wrote: Everything is apparently ruled and orchestrated by Seele. Including the UN.

[]:             Quote Post by planet news » Fri Feb 12, 2010 7:20 pm I actually know very little else about the global political theater in NGE other than Seele. This is a good topic if there is actually anymore information to be said about it.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Fri Feb 12, 2010 7:52 pm America's NOT a power. It's pretty explicit that life in the US has been shot to hell, especially from Episode Seven ("That country is allergic to unemployment, after all."). Germany is ascendant, however. It's always been second rate to France and Britain, but now those two places are flooded. China is doing all right, India's been nuked to hell, Brazil probably flooded and lost its power... Rebuild's not especially relevant here, but it's not spoilery to point out that there's indications that Russia is doing okay in that continuity at least. Presumably any land that has nothing between it and Antarctica has lost power. So basically, the UN is probably really powerful and all the countries that matter are happily a part of it.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Fri Feb 12, 2010 8:20 pm Allemann wrote: planet news wrote: Everything is apparently ruled and orchestrated by Seele. Including the UN.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 12, 2010 8:22 pm Allemann wrote: Most people overstate and overrate SEELE's influence on the global political theater.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Sat Feb 13, 2010 12:53 am I would think the countries whose populations are mostly at least one hundred miles away from coastlines are doing well (Germany, Russia, err, everyone else loves waterfront views apparently).

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Feb 13, 2010 4:30 am thewayneiac wrote: Seele rules the world.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sat Feb 13, 2010 9:34 am Allemann wrote: thewayneiac wrote: Seele rules the world.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Feb 13, 2010 10:02 am thewayneiac wrote: What part of The Classified Information wrote: An esoteric secret society born during the medieval Dark Ages and originally a religious order. Slowly but surely, they extended their influence, until at last they crushed the final forces of opposition in the mid-20th century and became a latent power with covert rule over human society .

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Feb 13, 2010 10:27 am "Covert rule over entire humanity" can only happen through manipulating UN. Obviously SEELE doesn't control absolutely every little detail, they do have the control over the big picture though

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Feb 13, 2010 11:31 am Xard wrote: "Covert rule over entire humanity" can only happen through manipulating UN.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Feb 13, 2010 11:42 am Shin-seiki wrote: Xard wrote: "Covert rule over entire humanity" can only happen through manipulating UN.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Feb 13, 2010 11:52 am Sure they do... their military forces just don't know who they really serve.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Feb 13, 2010 11:58 am NemZ wrote: Sure they do... their military forces just don't know who they really serve.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Feb 13, 2010 12:04 pm Xard wrote: All world militaries are part of the U.N forces.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Feb 13, 2010 12:30 pm Allemann wrote: thewayneiac wrote: What part of The Classified Information wrote: An esoteric secret society born during the medieval Dark Ages and originally a religious order. Slowly but surely, they extended their influence, until at last they crushed the final forces of opposition in the mid-20th century and became a latent power with covert rule over human society .

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 13, 2010 3:46 pm Well, there's always the other things. EoE Theater Booklet: [SEELE] A secret organization that existed since before Second Impact. It covered up the truth about Second Impact and the existence of the Angels, and possesses power exceeding even that of sovereign nations and the UN . After Second Impact, it used the UN as a front to establish the Instrumentality Committee and Special Agency NERV, and to build the Eva series. SEELE's Instrumentality Project proceeded according to the account written in the "Secret Dead Sea Scrolls", and aimed to move humankind to the next level of evolution. However, the loss of the Lance of Longinus and then the further rebellion of NERV Commander Gendou Ikari forced SEELE to modify the plan at the final stage. Incidentally, "Seele" means "soul" in German. Further, the names of all the organizations that are related to SEELE, such as GEHIRN and NERV, are also derived from German. Could it be that SEELE originated in Germany?

Wknow there was a world war immediately following Second Impact. We know since then the UN has been transformed into a unified, militarized organization. The four great powers of Post-2I world seem to be Japan, America, Germany, and China. Is there is any other information
